title: Eternal Potions
description: Reusable potions with powerful vanilla effects.
body: _Inspired by the [Second Wind](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/second-wind) mod by Lordepos._ **Eternal Potions** introduces a collection of reusable potions that grant vanilla buffs to enhance exploration, combat, and survival, while fitting seamlessly into vanilla gameplay and modpacks. These potions aren’t meant to make you invincible, but they’ll give you the edge when you need it most. Each potion draws its name and theme from **Greek mythology**. ## Potions & Effects | Potion |Effects |Cooldown |Recipe Unlock Requirement | | ----------------- |--------------------------------------------------------------- |-------- |----------------------------- | | Hermes’ Grace |Haste II (2:30) |10 min |Travel 1000 blocks on foot | | Atalanta’s Dash |Speed II (2:30) + Jump Boost (2:30) |6 min |Jump 100 times | | Demeter’s Bounty |Regeneration I (30s) + Saturation (30s) |10 min |Craft a Golden Apple | | Ares’ Bulwark |Resistance I (2:00) + Absorption II (2:00) |12 min |Block an attack with a Shield | | Poseidon’s Gift |Water Breathing (2:30) + Speed I (2:30) |8 min |Catch 25 fish | | Artemis’ Veil |Night Vision (2:30) + Resistance I (2:30) + Invisibility (2:30) |10 min |Kill 5 mobs with a Bow | | Hephaestus’ Ember |Fire Resistance (3:00) + Haste I (3:00) |15 min |Enter the Nether | | Heracles’ Wrath |Strength II (2:00) + Resistance I (2:00) |12 min |Kill an Iron Golem | | Tyche’s Gamble |Luck III (2:00) |15 min |Trade 5 times with a villager | | Hygieia’s Draught |Instant Health I + Health Boost I (2:00) |12 min |Eat a Glistering Melon | ## Features * **Reusable** — Use them over and over (they’re not consumed)   * **Vanilla-friendly** — Only standard Minecraft effects * Works in singleplayer & multiplayer (cooldowns are player-based) * Recipes themed after Greek gods using fitting ingredients   * **Unlock crafting recipes by completing custom advancements** * Custom bottle-like items with unique colors and designs   * Balanced to fit modded or vanilla-style play — from Skyblock to Adventure packs ## FAQ > **How do I craft the potions?**   > Complete the matching advancement to unlock each recipe. The potions are crafted using a vanilla crafting table. > **Are the potions strong?**   > They give meaningful boosts like Speed II, Strength II, or Haste II — but for short durations and with a reasonable cooldown to keep things a little balanced. (Balancing WIP) > **Can I spam or stack them?**   > No — each potion has its cooldown, and using more copies doesn’t bypass it. > **Do I lose the potion when I use it?**   > Nope — you keep the potion forever. Just wait for the cooldown before using it again. ## Perfect for players who want: * **A smoother early game** (get mining & exploring faster)   * **Useful utility boosts** without breaking the game   * **A fun mythological theme** that fits into any modpack
